allow: PowerShell($body = '{"username":"admin","password":"admin123"}'; $response = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:8080/api/auth/login" -Method POST -Body $body -ContentType "application/json" -ErrorVariable err -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($response\) { Write-Output "LOGIN EXITOSO"; Write-Output "Token: $\($response.token.Substring\(0,30\)\)..."; Write-Output "Rol: $\($response.rol\)" } else { Write-Output "ERROR: $err" })

PowerShell(& "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "ALTER TABLE curso ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS hora_inicio_permitida TIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '07:00', ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS hora_fin_permitida TIME NOT NULL DEFAULT '22:00';")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'postgres'; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "SELECT franja_id, dia_semana, hora_inicio, hora_valida, es_valida FROM franja_horaria ORDER BY dia_semana, hora_inicio LIMIT 20;")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'postgres'; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "SELECT d.nombre_completo, d.tipo_vinculacion, disp.dia_semana, disp.hora_inicio, disp.hora_fin FROM disponibilidad_docente disp JOIN docente d ON d.docente_id = disp.docente_id ORDER BY d.docente_id, disp.dia_semana, disp.hora_inicio LIMIT 40;")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'postgres'; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "SELECT d.nombre_completo, d.tipo_vinculacion, disp.dia_semana, disp.hora_inicio, disp.hora_fin FROM disponibilidad_docente disp JOIN docente d ON d.docente_id = disp.docente_id ORDER BY d.docente_id, disp.dia_semana, disp.hora_inicio OFFSET 40;")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'postgres'; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "SELECT franja_id, dia_semana, hora_inicio, hora_valida, es_valida FROM franja_horaria WHERE hora_inicio >= '17:00' ORDER BY dia_semana, hora_inicio;")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = 'postgres'; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "SELECT d.docente_id, d.nombre_completo, d.tipo_vinculacion, string_agg\(DISTINCT disp.dia_semana, ',' ORDER BY disp.dia_semana\) AS dias, MIN\(disp.hora_inicio\)::text AS desde, MAX\(disp.hora_fin\)::text AS hasta FROM disponibilidad_docente disp JOIN docente d ON d.docente_id = disp.docente_id GROUP BY d.docente_id, d.nombre_completo, d.tipo_vinculacion ORDER BY d.docente_id;")

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "ALTER TABLE usuario DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS usuario_rol_check; ALTER TABLE usuario ADD CONSTRAINT usuario_rol_check CHECK \(rol IN \('ADMIN','DOCENTE','ESTUDIANTE'\)\);" 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "SELECT username, rol, LEFT\(password,15\) as pwd_inicio FROM usuario WHERE rol='ESTUDIANTE';" 2>&1 | Out-String)

PowerShell($env:PGPASSWORD = "postgres"; & "C:\\Program Files\\PostgreSQL\\18\\bin\\psql.exe" -U postgres -d horarios_db -c "SELECT username, LEFT\(password,7\) as inicio FROM usuario WHERE rol='ESTUDIANTE';" 2>&1 | Out-String)
